summary.lv: Data Team Lead amats SEHNER-International, vadot 4 datu speciālistu komandu, organizējot darbplūsmas un uzlabojot procesus, nodrošinot kvalitatīvus datus un virzot automatizāciju (SQL/PostgreSQL, Python, ETL, n8n, AI).
summary.en: A Data Team Lead role at SEHNER-International leading a team of 4 data specialists, organizing workflows and improving processes to ensure reliable data, and driving automation (SQL/PostgreSQL, Python, ETL, n8n, AI).
